request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While strategic autonomy sounds good in theory, it's making us LESS secure. Our allies are cutting back on shared defense commitments because they see us as unreliable. Meanwhile, local governments are struggling to prepare for emergencies without clear federal coordination. It's time to face the facts: real security comes from strong alliances, not going it alone. #NationalSecurity #StrongerTogether
